text: Nuno Felix RT @JenGriffinFNC : In a House Armed Services Subcommittee hearing last week the Director of the Pentagon's Defense Intelligence Agency warned of Iran's remaining missile and drone capabilities, which runs counter to what top Pentagon officials have told the press during televised briefings at the Pentagon. Director of the Defense Intelligence Agency Lt. Gen. James Adams (April 16) “Despite significant degradation of Iranian military capabilities through coalition strikes in operation Epic Fury Tehran retains thousands of missiles and one-way attack UAV's capable of threatening U.S. and partner forces throughout the region.” NEW: Iran still has more military capacity than Trump admin is admitting publicly, sources told @CBSNews. @ellee_watson @JimLaPorta and me: https://www.cbsnews.com/news/iran-more-capable-than-trump-admin-publicly-acknowledging/ - Jennifer Jacobs tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @JenGriffinFNC：在上周的众议院军事委员会小组听证会上，五角大楼国防情报局局长警告了伊朗剩余的导弹和无人机能力，这与五角大楼高级官员在五角大楼电视简报会上告诉媒体的内容相矛盾。国防情报局局长詹姆斯·亚当斯中将（4 月 16 日）：“尽管在‘史诗愤怒’行动中通过联军打击使伊朗的军事能力显著下降，但德黑兰仍保留了数千枚导弹和单向攻击无人机，能够威胁整个地区的美国及其伙伴部队。” 最新消息：消息人士告诉 @CBSNews，伊朗拥有的军事能力比特朗普政府公开承认的要多。 @ellee_watson @JimLaPorta 和我：https://www.cbsnews.com/news/iran-more-capable-than-trump-admin-publicly-acknowledging/ - Jennifer Jacobs 推文

text: ❗️ In response to the Israeli violation of the ceasefire and attacked a civilian car today in Al-Tiri and killing two civilians Hezbullah attacked with an FPV an Israeli humvee vehicle in the Lebanese town of Al-Qantara
text_zh: ❗️ 为回应以色列违反停火协议并于今日袭击 Al-Tiri 的一辆平民车辆导致两名平民死亡，真主党使用 FPV 无人机袭击了黎巴嫩 Al-Qantara 镇的一辆以色列悍马车。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said its troops identified two vehicles in southern Lebanon that had departed from a Hezbollah-linked military structure and approached Israeli forces after crossing the Forward Defense Line. The individuals were deemed to be violating ceasefire understandings and posing an immediate threat, prompting an Israeli Air Force strike on one of the vehicles. The structure from which they had departed was also targeted. The IDF said it received reports that two journalists were injured in the strikes, adding that it is not preventing rescue teams from reaching the area and that the incident is under review. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军称，其部队在黎巴嫩南部发现两辆车辆，它们从与真主党有关的军事设施出发，在越过前沿防线后接近以色列军队。这些人被认为违反了停火协议并构成直接威胁，促使以色列空军对其中一辆车辆进行了打击。他们出发的设施也成为了打击目标。以色列国防军表示，已收到两名记者在袭击中受伤的报告，并补充说并未阻止救援队进入该地区，目前该事件正在审查中。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 N12: U.S. officials are uncertain about who is making decisions in Iran due to a power struggle between the IRGC and the civilian leadership. The Iranian Supreme Leader Khamenei, is reportedly not communicating with the rest of the leadership, and there is a rift between the negotiating team and the military. A US official noted that there is a complete divide within Iran between the negotiating team and the military, with neither side having full access to the Supreme Leader. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 N12：由于伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队与文职领导层之间的权力斗争，美国官员不确定伊朗目前由谁在做决策。据报道，伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊没有与其余领导层沟通，谈判团队与军方之间存在分歧。一位美国官员指出，伊朗内部在谈判团队和军方之间存在完全的割裂，双方都无法完全接触到最高领袖。@wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, the Pentagon has said that 400 U.S. servicemembers have been wounded in action since the start of the conflict with Iran. Per the report, 271 are from the Army, 64 are from the Navy, 19 are from the Marine Corps, and 46 are from the Air Force. The number of killed in action remains at 13. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》报道，五角大楼表示，自与伊朗的冲突开始以来，已有400名美国军人在行动中受伤。根据报告，其中271人来自陆军，64人来自海军，19人来自海军陆战队，46人来自空军。阵亡人数仍为13人。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The moment of interception of a Russian Gerbera long-range reconnaissance UAV with the US-made AGM-114 Hellfire missile over Kyiv earlier today. Possibly, the missile was fired from the V2X Tempest short-range air defense system. The Tempest, developed by US-based defense contractor V2X, was publicly unveiled for the first time in October 2025. The circumstances of the delivery of this SAM system to Ukraine remain unknown at the current moment, though it was suggested that it might have been provided to Kyiv covertly for combat trials before its first public unveiling. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 今天早些时候，一枚俄罗斯“天竺葵”（Gerbera）远程侦察无人机在基辅上空被美制AGM-114“地狱火”导弹拦截。该导弹可能是从V2X“暴风雨”（Tempest）近程防空系统发射的。由美国国防承包商V2X开发的“暴风雨”系统于2025年10月首次公开亮相。目前尚不清楚该防空系统交付给乌克兰的情况，但有人认为它可能是在首次公开亮相前被秘密提供给基辅进行作战试验的。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack says "real breakthroughs are imminent" on Türkiye's possible return to the F-35 program. - Fox News https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047008959861592073/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克表示，关于土耳其可能重返F-35项目，“真正的突破即将到来”。—— 福克斯新闻 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047008959861592073/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According the Washington Post, citing three sources with knowledge on the matter, the Pentagon has told Congress that Iran may have placed up to 20 naval mines in and around the Strait of Hormuz and that it may take up to 6 months for clearance operations to conclude. Additionally, per the report, it’s unlikely that said operations can be carried out until the end of the conflict with Iran and a long-term ceasefire can be put in place. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华盛顿邮报》援引三位知情人士的话报道，五角大楼已告知国会，伊朗可能在霍尔木兹海峡及其周边地区部署了多达20枚海军水雷，清理行动可能需要长达6个月的时间才能完成。此外，根据报告，在与伊朗的冲突结束并达成长期停火协议之前，不太可能进行上述清理行动。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on renewing the sanctions waiver on purchases of Russian oil: Last week was Bank Week, World Bank and IMF Week. On Wednesday, it was my belief we would not do it. I was approached by more than 10 of the most vulnerable and poorest countries in terms of energy, and they asked us to extend that sanction, and it's only for 30 days. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特谈到延长俄罗斯石油购买制裁豁免时表示：上周是银行周，世界银行和国际货币基金组织周。周三时，我认为我们不会这样做。但有超过10个在能源方面最脆弱和最贫穷的国家找到我们，请求我们延长制裁豁免，而且仅延长30天。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @DanLamothe : EXCLUSIVE: It could take six months to fully clear the Strait of Hormuz of mines deployed by the Iranian military, and any such operation is unlikely to be carried out until the U.S. war with Iran ends, the Pentagon has informed Congress — an assessment that means the conflict’s economic impact could extend late into this year or beyond. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @DanLamothe：独家报道：完全清除伊朗军方部署在霍尔木兹海峡的水雷可能需要六个月的时间，而且在美伊战争结束之前，不太可能进行此类行动。五角大楼已告知国会——这一评估意味着冲突的经济影响可能会持续到今年晚些时候甚至更久。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Israel has been informed that Trump's new deadline to Iran ends on Sunday, according to Israeli Channel 12. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047006610946404533/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 快讯 | 据以色列第12频道报道，以色列已获悉特朗普给伊朗设定的新最后期限将于周日结束。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047006610946404533/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Iranian President Pezeshkian says that Iran is and will always be open to dialogue and agreements, but will not tolerate breach of commitments or threats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬表示，伊朗过去、现在和将来都对对话与协议持开放态度，但绝不容忍违背承诺或威胁。@wfwitness

text: Mouin Rabbani | Middle East Expert | Jadaliyya E-Magazine: Turkish & Israeli strategy in Syria is diametrically opposed. Israel wants Syria weak, powerless & defenseless. Türkiye wants a stable Syria with a central government, but one that is friendly to Ankara. Both countries are deeply involved in Syria. So a direct clash, not only between forces they support but perhaps even directly, is entirely plausible. But it remains a big if. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 穆因·拉巴尼 | 中东专家 | Jadaliyya电子杂志：土耳其和以色列在叙利亚的战略截然相反。以色列希望叙利亚虚弱、无力且毫无防备。土耳其希望叙利亚稳定并拥有一个中央政府，但必须是对安卡拉友好的政府。两国都深度介入叙利亚局势。因此，不仅在它们支持的势力之间，甚至可能在两国之间发生直接冲突，都是完全有可能的。但这仍然是一个巨大的未知数。完整采访

text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 爱泼斯坦的阿拉伯联合大使在被占领的巴勒斯坦庆祝“灾难日” 🚩 抵抗战壕 | 转发

text: Peru’s Defense and Foreign Ministers—Carlos Díaz and Hugo de Zela—quit after President José María Balcázar halted a major F-16 purchase from Lockheed Martin. The president said an interim government shouldn’t approve such a deal.
text_zh: 秘鲁国防部长卡洛斯·迪亚斯（Carlos Díaz）和外交部长雨果·德·泽拉（Hugo de Zela）在总统何塞·玛丽亚·巴尔卡萨尔（José María Balcázar）叫停了一项从洛克希德·马丁公司购买F-16战斗机的重大交易后辞职。总统表示，过渡政府不应批准此类交易。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack on his strong leadership remarks in the Middle East: When I said that ‘powerful leadership regimes,’ whether benevolent monarchies or the kind of monarchical republics seen elsewhere in the region, are the only structures that have actually worked in the Middle East, I was speaking from decades of hard-earned observation, not ideology. Imported models have repeatedly collapsed. Look at the track record. Countries that tried to adopt Western-style democracy quickly after the Arab Spring largely failed, often descending into chaos, civil war or new forms of authoritarianism. Meanwhile, stable, results-oriented leadership in places like the Gulf monarchies has delivered security, economic growth, modernization and real improvements in people’s lives. Türkiye, operating as a presidential republic with regular multiparty elections, also demonstrates how strong, centralized leadership under President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan has delivered stability, economic dynamism and assertive regional influence, though critics have described it as a hybrid regime with strong authoritarian tendencies. This is not a change in U.S. policy away from supporting democratic governance and human rights. It is a realistic assessment of what produces stability so that human rights and prosperity can take root. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克（Tom Barrack）就其在中东的强力领导言论表示：当我提到“强有力的领导政权”，无论是仁慈的君主制还是该地区其他地方所见的君主制共和国，都是中东地区唯一真正行之有效的结构时，我是在基于数十年的艰苦观察，而非意识形态。外来模式已多次崩溃。看看过往记录吧。那些在“阿拉伯之春”后迅速试图采用西方民主制度的国家大多失败了，往往陷入混乱、内战或新型威权主义。与此同时，像海湾君主国这样稳定且注重成果的领导层带来了安全、经济增长、现代化和人民生活的真正改善。土耳其作为一个实行定期多党选举的总统制共和国，也展示了在雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安总统领导下，强有力的中央集权领导如何带来了稳定、经济活力和果断的地区影响力，尽管批评者将其描述为具有强烈威权倾向的混合政权。这并非美国政策从支持民主治理和人权转向。这是对什么能产生稳定从而使人权和繁荣得以扎根的现实评估。来源：福克斯新闻

text: Former European Council Chief Charles Michel publicly countered Ursula von der Leyen after she referenced Turkish influence alongside Russia and China. Michel highlighted Türkiye as a core NATO ally, energy hub, and migration partner, calling for realism in EU policy. The exchange triggered debate across Europe.
text_zh: 前欧洲理事会主席查尔斯·米歇尔（Charles Michel）在乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩（Ursula von der Leyen）将土耳其的影响力与俄罗斯和中国相提并论后，公开反驳了她。米歇尔强调土耳其是北约的核心盟友、能源枢纽和移民合作伙伴，呼吁欧盟政策保持现实主义。这次交流在欧洲引发了辩论。

text: A new investigation by the Conflict Insights Group says Colombian mercenaries, backed by the UAE, helped Sudan’s RSF capture El-Fasher in October 2025. The fighters operated drones, trained RSF units, and supported the siege. Phone-tracking data links them from Colombia to a UAE military facility and then into Sudan. The report says this support was critical to the assault and may tie the network to war crimes and crimes against humanity. Source: BBC
text_zh: 冲突洞察小组（Conflict Insights Group）的一项新调查显示，在阿联酋的支持下，哥伦比亚雇佣兵帮助苏丹快速支援部队（RSF）于2025年10月占领了法希尔。这些武装人员操作无人机、训练RSF部队并支持围攻。电话追踪数据将他们从哥伦比亚连接到阿联酋的一个军事设施，随后进入苏丹。报告称，这种支持对袭击至关重要，并可能将该网络与战争罪和反人类罪联系起来。来源：BBC

text: Michael A. Horowitz The US has informed Israel that the ceasefire with Iran is only extended until Sunday, according to Israeli media tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）：据以色列媒体推文称，美国已通知以色列，与伊朗的停火协议仅延长至周日。

text: Open Source Intel South Korea's Foreign Ministry special envoy met with Iranian FM Araghchi. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047005636269900146/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：韩国外交部特使会见了伊朗外长阿拉格希（Araghchi）。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047005636269900146/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Israel has been informed that Trump's new deadline to Iran ends on Sunday — Channel 12 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：突发新闻——据第12频道推文，以色列已获悉特朗普给伊朗设定的新最后期限将于周日结束。

text: Open Source Intel REPORT: Pakistan pushing to restart U.S.-Iran talks despite Iran's seizure of two cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz. PM Sharif met Iran's ambassador Wednesday. A second round of negotiations could come within days, officials say. - NYT tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：报道：尽管伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘货船，巴基斯坦仍在推动重启美伊谈判。总理谢里夫周三会见了伊朗大使。官员们表示，第二轮谈判可能在几天内进行。——《纽约时报》推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV on negotiations between Lebanon and Israel: The meeting between Lebanon and Israel, with the participation of Rubio, will take place tomorrow at 4:00 PM Washington time, which corresponds to 11:00 PM Beirut time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV关于黎巴嫩与以色列谈判的报道：黎巴嫩与以色列的会议将在卢比奥的参与下于华盛顿时间明天下午4:00举行，即贝鲁特时间晚上11:00。@wfwitness
